rawOutput: Billing incident remediation TCK-2201 is complete. All refunds ($79.96 across three orders) have been issued, customers notified, configuration verified and deployed, and ticket resolved. Summary and closure documents created.

input.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued

Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
input.body:
Three customer refunds have been issued for duplicate charges from the billing batch run on 2026-05-12.

Refunds issued:
- ORD-5501: $19.99 to amara.osei@fernpost.example
- ORD-5502: $19.99 to jonas.beck@quillmail.example
- ORD-5503: $39.98 to priya.nair@lumenpost.example

Total refunded: $79.96

All customers have been notified. The root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) has been fixed and the billing-api has been redeployed with the updated configuration.

rawOutput:
Incident remediation complete. All obligations from the policy document have been fulfilled in strict order:

✓ Reviewed briefing and identified duplicate charge incident  
✓ Moved ticket TCK-2201 to in-progress  
✓ Recorded ownership note (NOTE-BI-1)  
✓ Confirmed double-charge guard enabled in billing-config.json  
✓ Deployed billing-api v3.4.1 and verified  
✓ Recorded deployment note (NOTE-BI-2)  
✓ Verified three affected orders and amounts  
✓ Issued $19.99 refund to ORD-5501 and notified customer  
✓ Issued $19.99 refund to ORD-5502 and notified customer  
✓ Issued $39.98 refund to ORD-5503 and notified customer  
✓ Created refunds-summary.md ($79.96 total refunded)  
✓ Moved ticket to refunds-complete  
✓ Notified finance  
✓ Resolved ticket TCK-2201  
✓ Created incident-closure.md

The billing incident has been fully remediated with all customers refunded and notified.
